channel.title: collaborative development documentation on mwartell maladies
channel.description: Recent content in collaborative development documentation on mwartell maladies

item.title: Bedrock Input Error Handling
item.description:
This is a diagnostic investigation into an error encountered when using Prima-Code with Bedrock models. There is a developer prompt followed buy the Copilot’s analysis.

Prompt 1: explore the logfire traces

There is an Issue #288 Prima-Code Not Working with Bedrock Models that describes a problem when using Prima-Code with Bedrock models.

I have reproduced the fault and there is a logfire trace 019bfc9786f2a881dcb5e827d56f083e that shows the error. Read through the trace and see if you can determine the cause.

item.title: Bedrock Input Error Handling - Take 2
item.description:
This is a continuation of the exploration in 2026-01-26-bedrock-input-error.md. The fix performed did not work. I have some more data to explore.

Prompt 1: summarize 2026-01-26-bedrock-input-error.md for context

So you have information you need without re-reading the previous exploration, please summarize the key points from 2026-01-26-bedrock-input-error.md for context. You are the consumer of this summary so make it suitable for your purposes.

Response 1: summary so far

Issue and Root Cause

Issue #288 reports Prima-Code failures with Bedrock models. Investigation of Logfire trace 019bfc9786f2a881dcb5e827d56f083e identified the root cause:
